程序包 insurance

类 ArgumentParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • insurance.ArgumentParser
  • public class ArgumentParser
extends java.lang.Object
    Parses and validates command line arguments. Supported options: --email, --email-template, --letter, --letter-template, --output-dir, --csv-file

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器 说明
      ArgumentParser​(java.lang.String[] args)
      Creates an ArgumentParser and parses the given args.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      修饰符和类型 方法 说明
      java.lang.String getCsvFilePath()
      Returns the path to the CSV file.
      java.lang.String getEmailTemplatePath()
      Returns the path to the email template file.
      java.lang.String getLetterTemplatePath()
      Returns the path to the letter template file.
      java.lang.String getOutputDirPath()
      Returns the path to the output folder.
      boolean isGenerateEmail()
      Returns true if the user wants to generate emails.
      boolean isGenerateLetter()
      Returns true if the user wants to generate letters.

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 构造器详细资料

      • ArgumentParser

        public ArgumentParser​(java.lang.String[] args)
        Creates an ArgumentParser and parses the given args. If args are invalid, prints an error message and exits.
        参数:
        args - command line arguments

    • 方法详细资料

      • isGenerateEmail

        public boolean isGenerateEmail()
        Returns true if the user wants to generate emails.
        返回:
        true if --email was provided

      • isGenerateLetter

        public boolean isGenerateLetter()
        Returns true if the user wants to generate letters.
        返回:
        true if --letter was provided

      • getEmailTemplatePath

        public java.lang.String getEmailTemplatePath()
        Returns the path to the email template file.
        返回:
        email template path, or null if not provided

      • getLetterTemplatePath

        public java.lang.String getLetterTemplatePath()
        Returns the path to the letter template file.
        返回:
        letter template path, or null if not provided

      • getOutputDirPath

        public java.lang.String getOutputDirPath()
        Returns the path to the output folder.
        返回:
        output directory path

      • getCsvFilePath

        public java.lang.String getCsvFilePath()
        Returns the path to the CSV file.
        返回:
        CSV file path
